food_subgroup: Chocolate and hazelnut filled sponge cake with praline crust

ontology.foodon_gap_note: No specific FoodOn entry exists for Nutella-filled hazelnut praline sponge cake. FOODON_03301710 (cake food product) used as closest parent category.
ontology.foodex2_gap_note: FoodEx2 A00LC (Cakes, pastries and similar products) is the closest defensible parent. No specific code exists for Nutella hazelnut praline sponge cake.
ontology.snomed_ct_gap_note: SNOMED CT 226529007 (Cake) used as closest parent; no specific code for Nutella hazelnut praline sponge cake exists.

serving.natural_language_portion: One individual piece of Hazelnut Nutella Crunchy Tapak Kuda Cake, approximately 120 g, as sold by Kazo Premium at Funan, Singapore.

nutrient_source.title: Chocolate cake with frosting, commercially prepared — USDA FoodData Central SR Legacy (NDB 18139); supplemented with Nutella hazelnut spread nutrient profile (USDA Branded Foods FDC ID 2003571) for hazelnut-chocolate filling adjustment
nutrient_source.organization: USDA Agricultural Research Service — FoodData Central
nutrient_source.source_match_notes: No exact HPB Singapore Foodo entry exists for this specific commercial product. Nutrient values are adapted from USDA SR Legacy chocolate cake with frosting (NDB 18139) as the closest structural analogue (sponge cake with chocolate filling and coating), with upward adjustment to fat and sugar to reflect the Nutella hazelnut spread filling and hazelnut praline crust. Values represent a reasonable central estimate for a rich Nutella-filled sponge cake with praline. Confidence is medium due to adaptation.

gi_source.title: Chocolate cake, made from packet mix — GI value 38 (Atkinson et al., 2008); chocolate hazelnut spread (Nutella) GI approximately 33 (Foster-Powell et al., 2002); composite sponge cake with high sugar and refined flour estimated GI 60–70 per University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries
gi_source.source_match_notes: No direct GI measurement exists for this specific commercial product. GI of 65 is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries: chocolate cake (GI ~38–50 for dense/packet-mix variants) and refined-flour sponge cakes with high sugar content (GI 60–70). The high sugar load from Nutella filling and praline crust shifts the composite GI upward toward the medium range. GL per serving calculated as (GI × carbohydrate_g per serving) / 100 = (65 × 62.4) / 100 ≈ 40.6, based on 120 g serving with 52 g carbohydrate per 100 g.

hypertension.key_factor: Sodium content (185 mg per 100 g) and high sugar load contributing to caloric excess and weight gain
hypertension.guidance: Individuals with hypertension should limit portion size to a small slice, as the moderate sodium content and high caloric density may contribute to fluid retention and weight-related blood pressure elevation.

type2_diabetes.key_factor: High sugar content (36 g per 100 g), high refined carbohydrate load, and medium glycemic index (GI 65) with high glycemic load per serving (~40.6)
type2_diabetes.guidance: This cake is high in rapidly absorbed sugars and refined carbohydrates with a medium GI and high GL per serving; individuals with Type 2 Diabetes should avoid or strictly limit consumption and monitor postprandial blood glucose carefully.

cardiovascular_disease.key_factor: High saturated fat (7.8 g per 100 g), trans fat (0.2 g per 100 g), high sugar, and high caloric density (410 kcal per 100 g)
cardiovascular_disease.guidance: The combination of saturated fat, trans fat, and high sugar in this product poses a significant cardiovascular risk; individuals with cardiovascular disease should treat this as an occasional indulgence and keep portions very small.

llm_training.natural_language_description: Hazelnut Nutella Crunchy Tapak Kuda Cake is a rich, indulgent dessert cake sold by Kazo Premium at Funan Mall in Singapore. The cake features a generous filling of Nutella hazelnut chocolate spread encased in a soft, moist sponge that combines vanilla and chocolate flavours. The exterior is finished with a hazelnut praline crunch, providing a satisfying textural contrast between the crisp, nutty coating and the tender, creamy interior. The name 'Tapak Kuda' (Malay for 'horseshoe') likely refers to the distinctive shape of the cake. Nutritionally, this is a calorie-dense, ultra-processed dessert providing approximately 410 kcal per 100 g, with high sugar (36 g), moderate-to-high fat (20.5 g including 7.8 g saturated fat), and a medium glycemic index of approximately 65. The high glycemic load per serving (~40.6) makes it a significant concern for individuals managing Type 2 Diabetes or cardiovascular disease. It contains common allergens including gluten, eggs, milk, hazelnuts, and soy. This product is best enjoyed as an occasional treat and is not suitable for regular consumption by individuals with metabolic or cardiovascular conditions. It is a commercially prepared, bakery-style dessert representative of Singapore's premium café and patisserie scene.
common_user_queries: How many calories in Nutella Tapak Kuda cake?
Is Nutella hazelnut cake suitable for diabetics?
What is in Kazo Nutella cake?
Hazelnut praline sponge cake Singapore calories

confidence_reason: No exact nutritional entry exists in HPB Singapore Foodo or any approved primary regional source for this specific commercial product. Nutrient values are adapted from USDA SR Legacy chocolate cake with frosting (NDB 18139) and USDA Branded Foods Nutella profile, representing the closest structural analogues. GI is estimated from University of Sydney GI Database analogous entries. Confidence is medium due to the adapted rather than exact source match.
notes: Vitamin D (vitamin_d_mcg) is set to -1 as it is not reported in the USDA SR Legacy source for chocolate cake (NDB 18139) and is not reliably quantified for this product category. Selenium (selenium_mcg) is set to -1 as it is not reported in the primary adapted source. Vitamin C (vitamin_c_mg) is 0.0; this is confirmed zero as chocolate sponge cake with hazelnut filling contains no meaningful vitamin C by formulation — confirmed zero per USDA FoodData Central analogous entries. Trans fat (trans_fat_g) of 0.2 g per 100 g reflects a small residual trans fat contribution from commercial baking fats, consistent with USDA data for commercially prepared chocolate cake. Halal status is listed as false/unknown as no halal certification information is available from the GrabFood listing or Kazo Premium public information at time of processing. The serving size of 120 g is an estimate for one individual piece as described in the product listing; actual weight may vary. Glycemic load per serving calculated as (65 × 52.0 × 1.20) / 100 = 40.6 g. All -1 sentinel values reflect nutrients not reported in the adapted USDA source and not reliably estimable for this specific product.
